html:
Exclusive to:

The Dumbrella is a Dress Item exclusive to the Shipwrecked DLC and its counterpart to the Eyebrella in the Reign of Giants DLC. It can be crafted with 2 Shark Gills, an Umbrella, and a Straw Hat, and requires an Alchemy Engine or Sea Lab to prototype. It can also be found within a Steamer Trunk. A Sewing Kit repairs 41% of its durability.

Like an Eyebrella, it offers 100% water resistance, lightning protection and provides 240 points of protection from Overheating. It can be equipped as a hat with both the hands and the chest slot free making it one of the most valuable items in the game.

Trivia

Old Dumbrella icon.
  • The word "Dumbrella" is a combination of the words "double" and "umbrella", purposefully spelling "dumb" to indicate the strange look of the item, despite it being very practical.
  • Before it was made craftable with Shark Gills in the Eye of the Tiger Shark update, the Dumbrella had alterned colours of blue and white, instead of orange and white, with additional black stripes.

Assets

  • Dropped
  • Equipped
  • Dropped Old
  • Equipped Old

Gallery

  • Wigfrid wearing the old version of the Dumbrella.
  • The old version of the Dumbrella dropped in the Ocean.
  • Warly wearing the final version of the Dumbrella.
  • Dumbrella as seen in the poster for the Eye of the Tiger Shark update.

“The second umbrella keeps the first umbrella dry.”
–Wilson
“If I bought this in a store I'd feel burned.”
–Willow
“Two umbrellas is better than one.”
–Wolfgang
“This seems excessive.”
–Wendy
“DESIGN REDUNDANCY PROVIDES PEAK PERFORMANCE”
–WX-78
“Two tiers of shelter!”
–Wickerbottom
“Double the protection!”
–Woodie
“This looks silly.”
–Maxwell
“Its duplicate canopies have increased its effectiveness exponentially.”
–Wagstaff
“What kind öf strange helm is this?”
–Wigfrid
“One for each of us!”
–Webber
“This should keep me at least twice as dry.”
–Walani
“Ridiculous! I want one.”
–Warly
“'Tis th'work of a madman.”
–Woodlegs
“HATH TWICE THE FANCIES!”
–Wilba
“Two Times Rain Taker”
–Wormwood
“I'll be twice as sure to forget it at home now.”
–Wheeler
The Dumbrella is a Dress Item exclusive to the Shipwrecked DLC and its counterpart to the Eyebrella in the Reign of Giants DLC. It can be crafted with 2 Shark Gills, an Umbrella, and a Straw Hat, and requires an Alchemy Engine or Sea Lab to prototype. It can also be found within a Steamer Trunk. A Sewing Kit repairs 41% of its durability.
Like an Eyebrella, it offers 100% water resistance, lightning protection and provides 240 points of protection from Overheating. It can be equipped as a hat with both the hands and the chest slot free making it one of the most valuable items in the game.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
Old Dumbrella icon.
The word "Dumbrella" is a combination of the words "double" and "umbrella", purposefully spelling "dumb" to indicate the strange look of the item, despite it being very practical.
Before it was made craftable with Shark Gills in the Eye of the Tiger Shark update, the Dumbrella had alterned colours of blue and white, instead of orange and white, with additional black stripes.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Dumbrella là một Trang Phục độc quyền trong DLC ​​Shipwrecked và tương ứng với Eyebrella trong DLC ​​Reign of Giants. Nó có thể được chế tạo bằng 2 Mang cá mập, một chiếc ô và một chiếc mũ rơm, đồng thời yêu cầu Máy luyện kim hoặc Phòng thí nghiệm biển để tạo nguyên mẫu. Nó cũng có thể được tìm thấy trong Steamer Trunk. Bộ May vá sửa chữa 41% độ bền của nó.
